---
title: "Learning reward functions from imperfect human feedback for robotic decision making"
author: "Neil Janwani"
bibliography: references.bib
csl: custom.csl
format:
  clean-nav-revealjs:
    slide-number: "c/t"
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <script src="nav-sections.js"></script>
subtitle: "<span style='font-size: 0.7em;'>Committee: Prof. Matthew Gombolay (Chair), Prof. Maegan Tucker (Advisor), Prof. Sonia Chernova</span>"
---


{{< include slides/introduction.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/paradigms-1.qmd >}}
<!-- {{< include slides/paradigms-2.qmd >}} -->
{{< include slides/imperfect-overview.qmd >}}
<!-- {{< include slides/transitions/transition-inconsistency.qmd >}} -->
{{< include slides/approximate-rationality.qmd >}}
<!-- {{< include slides/outline.qmd >}} -->

<!-- {{< include slides/transitions/transition-imperfect.qmd >}} -->
{{< include slides/inconsistency.qmd >}}
<!-- {{< include slides/coach-0.qmd >}} -->
{{< include slides/suboptimality.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/heterogeneity.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/open-problems.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/proposed/exploring-options.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/proposed/algorithmic-approach.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/proposed/algorithmic-approach/step-1.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/proposed/algorithmic-approach/step-2.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/proposed/algorithmic-approach/step-3.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/proposed/synthetic-evaluation.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/proposed/initial-results.qmd >}}
<!-- {{< include slides/proposed/strengths.qmd >}} -->
{{< include slides/proposed/limitations.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/references.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/transitions/transition-rewards.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/sample-efficiency-1.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/rlhf-1.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/rlhf-2.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/rlhf-3.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/coach-1.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/coach-2.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/coach-3.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/ird-1.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/ird-2.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/backup/human-study.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/backup/inconsistency-prelim.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/backup/inconsistency-1.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/backup/inconsistency-2.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/backup/subopt-hetero-1.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/backup/morlax.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/backup/ilr.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/backup/pbl_slides.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/backup/coverage_metric.qmd >}}
